recipes.title: Easy Meatloaf
recipes.description: This easy meatloaf recipe comes together quickly to make one of our best recipes that's been made over 8,000 times and never disappoints!
recipes.author: Janet Shum
instructions: Gather the ingredients. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Lightly grease a 9x5-inch loaf pan.
Combine ground beef, onion, milk, bread crumbs, and egg in a large bowl, and season with salt and pepper. Press mixture evenly into the prepared loaf pan.
Stir ketchup, brown sugar, and mustard together in a small bowl until smooth, and spread evenly over the meatloaf.
Bake in the preheated oven until no longer pink in the center, about 1 hour. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the middle reads at least 160 degrees F (70 degrees C).

recipes.title: Homemade Spaghetti Sauce with Ground Beef
recipes.description: Top spaghetti or your favorite pasta with this meaty homemade spaghetti sauce with ground beef recipe that's easy to make, and ready in about an hour.
recipes.author: Allrecipes Member
instructions: Combine ground beef, bell pepper, onion, and garlic in a large saucepan over medium-high heat; cook and stir until meat is browned and crumbly and vegetables are tender, 5 to 7 minutes. Drain grease.
Stir diced tomatoes, tomato sauce, and tomato paste into ground beef mixture; season with oregano, basil, salt, and black pepper. Simmer sauce for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
